title: rosa × hispidocarpa
intro: Rosa × hispidocarpa, also known as Rosa hybrid, is a hybrid species of rose derived from a cross between Rosa multiflora and Rosa rugosa, characterized by its unique combination of characteristics from its parent species. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where its leaves, flowers, and stems are used to treat various ailments, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rosa × hispidocarpa include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to protect against oxidative stress and promote overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
